subject: Weekly Reflection
notes: Solved 10 Leetcode problems including 2 medium (Group Anagrams, Top K Frequent). Focused heavily on mastering hashmaps/sets. Learned defaultdict, key immutability, time/space complexity estimation, and problem-solving patterns like bucket sort and key tuple tricks. Started learning stack and queue logic and applying them to problems. Gained strong intuition for hashmap coding.

subject: Leetcode
notes: Just grinded leetcode, I focused mainly on Queues and stacks. Learned a bit of linked lists as well!

subject: Linked Lists, Sliding Window, Problem Review
notes: Focused on deepening understanding of singly-linked list manipulation. Learned about dummy nodes for edge case handling, fast and slow pointer technique to detect cycles, and removal of nth node from end. Struggled with syntax and mental model but improved with hands-on LeetCode problems. Briefly touched on sliding window logic (without solving a full problem). Wrapped up with review plan and organizing solved problems.
